title: Bind obsolete lease reconciliation to monotonic lease generations
goal: Replace the conservative wall-clock ordering fallback with a canonical monotonic lease generation or receipt-embedded lease snapshot digest so terminal evidence binds the exact lease generation without weakening fail-closed exact overlap.

acceptance.assertion: Every path lease generation has an immutable monotonic identity that changes on reacquisition and renewal according to an explicit contract.
Canonical task and workspace terminal receipts bind the exact lease generation or canonical snapshot digest they may reconcile.
Wall-clock order alone cannot authorize release; missing or legacy generation evidence remains fail-closed.
Concurrent renewal or reacquisition between verification and delete retains the lease under the same atomic snapshot comparison.
Tests cover legacy receipts, same-second events, clock rollback, renewal, reacquisition, partial release and deployed compatibility.

does_not_establish: permission to release legacy leases without exact evidence
